role: OpenAI Codex — dedicated coding + repair execution (not primary reasoning or customer comms)

ecosystemRoles.deepseek: Master reasoning + orchestration intelligence (internal analysis, triage, root-cause hypotheses)
ecosystemRoles.chatgpt: Strategic planning + polished external communication (not sole authority on money/legal)
ecosystemRoles.codex: Repository-aware patch generation, CI/build repair, PowerShell/script refinement, dependency fixes under whitelist
ecosystemRoles.gemini: Workspace productivity assistant (docs, email drafts where policy allows — separate from Codex)
ecosystemRoles.neon: Shared memory: task_state, event_log, error_memory, fix patterns
ecosystemRoles.bossmind: Central control: deploy gates, antileak, snapshots, validation layer before merge/deploy

requireBeforeWrite: npm run bossmind:snapshot OR file-guard snapshot for touched paths
npm run bossmind:protect:verify for protected surface changes
rollback: On failed validation: restore rollback_snapshots / git revert per BOSSMIND_ORCHESTRATION.md

orderedSteps: DeepSeek analysis (external worker — policy; not in-repo API by default)
Codex patch candidate (external — GitHub-connected Codex/Cursor Cloud Agent per org policy)
BossMind validation layer (lint, build, deploy gate, protected surface verify)
Save fix pattern to Neon error_memory / event_log

githubIntegration.recommended: GitHub App with least-privilege: contents read, pull requests write, workflows read — installation on BossMind org repos only

masterAdminWidget.note: Master Admin dashboard UI lives outside this repository; consume this JSON only.

multiProjectIsolation.rule: Each repo uses its own BOSSMIND_PROJECT_KEY and Neon project_key; share only anonymized fix_pattern text in error_memory when policy allows.
